description_long: This is a tall, wrought iron floor candelabrum featuring four candle holders arranged in a circular pattern atop a sturdy, tripod base. Each candle holder contains a thick, cylindrical candle, with the holders connected by a circular metal band for added stability and visual symmetry. The metalwork is dark and weathered, giving the object an antique, rustic appearance suitable for outdoor or historical urban settings. The candles are off-white and appear unused, with no visible wax drips or burn marks. The base consists of three outward-curving legs, providing a stable foundation for the tall structure. The overall design is both decorative and functional, evoking a sense of old-world charm and durability.
description: A tall, wrought iron floor candelabrum with four off-white candles arranged in a circular holder atop a sturdy tripod base. The design is rustic and antique, suitable for outdoor or historical urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four candle holders and the circular metal band, with the tripod base visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the four candles and the circular arrangement, with the tripod base partially visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, maintaining visibility of the four candle holders and the circular band, with the base legs seen from a different perspective.
description_view_3: Final rotated view, similar to previous ones, showing the symmetry of the candle arrangement and the sturdy tripod base.
